description_long: This chair features a distinctive circular backrest and seat constructed from woven rattan or wicker, giving it a natural, artisanal appearance. The backrest curves upward and around in a continuous loop, providing both visual interest and ergonomic support. The seat is composed of tightly interlaced rattan strands, supported by a robust wooden frame. The legs are straight and made of dark-stained wood, contrasting with the lighter rattan elements. The open, airy design of the backrest and seat allows for ventilation and a lightweight aesthetic. This chair would be well-suited for stylish urban patios, cafes, or park seating areas.
description: A woven rattan chair with a circular, looped backrest and a sturdy wooden frame, blending natural textures with modern design. The open weave and curved form make it visually striking and comfortable.
description_view_0: Side view showing the circular backrest's full arc and the woven seat pattern, with the wooden legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Opposite side view highlighting the curvature of the backrest and the continuity of the woven rattan structure.
description_view_2: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the backrest's loop and the way the rattan is anchored to the wooden frame.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 0, but from the opposite direction, showing the open weave and the seat's depth.
